summary: Made two surgical seam edits: the opening now anchors the outage south of Caldera to carry forward Chapter 5's departure, and the closing now places the waste-log duplicate on Marisol's body to support Chapter 7's opening handoff.
edits: Added a Caldera reference to the opening sentence for smoother entry continuity from the prior chapter.
Adjusted the final Car 7 beat so Marisol tucks the damp waste-log duplicate into her waistband, setting up the next chapter's opening image.
